records.ety: [Properly, the parts which resist the pull or strain in drawing a load; fr. OE. wither resistance, AS. wiðre, fr. wiðer against; akin to G. widerrist withers. See With, prep.]

defs: The ridge between the shoulder bones of a horse, at the base of the neck. See Illust. of Horse.
quotes: Let the galled jade wince; our withers are unwrung.
